name: E-2 options schema: rubric/detectors/run-detector.sh accepts the --options <json> flag per the §16 E-2 final clause
command: grep -q -- '--options) OPTIONS=' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/run-detector.sh" && grep -q -E 'E-2 final clause.*detectors receive .{0,3}--options' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/run-detector.sh" && echo dispatched 1>&2
